jcr:content.jcr:description: A look at the resources and expertise that lead to a remarkable impact on people’s lives.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Key Facts
jcr:content.ctaAltText: Learn more about AbbVie's key facts
jcr:content.subtitle: Key Facts
jcr:content.title: Key Facts

text.text: AbbVie’s mission is to discover and deliver innovative medicines and solutions that address complex health issues and enhance people’s lives.

title.jcr:title: A Closer Look at Our Impact

text.text: AbbVie’s commitment to and progress on environmental, social and governance goals are outlined in this comprehensive 2025 report.

text_copy_copy_copy.text: See highlights from the past 10 years through our growth as a company and impact with patients, science, jobs, and communities.

text_copy_copy.text: For more information on AbbVie’s financial performance download the 2025 Annual Report.

text_copy.text: partnerships with leading biotechs, universities, nonprofits and government organizations to advance science

text_copy_1328432339.text: raised for ~13,000 nonprofit organizations through our Employee Giving Campaign

text_copy_1643319963.text: blockbuster products with 2025 net revenues greater than $1B

text_copy_2124625185.text:
conditions treated across
all stages of life

text_copy_copy.text:
compounds, devices or indications
in development individually
or under collaboration or license

text_copy_1328432339_437172037.text:
~74 million patients reached
with AbbVie products in 2025

text_copy_1328432339_572173969.text:
countries and territories
where AbbVie products
help patients

text_copy_1328432339_1204177202.text: * Adjusted R&D investment is a non-GAAP measure, which is reconciled in our 2026 Proxy Statement

text_copy_copy_copy.text: We’ve been honored to receive some of the most prestigious ratings and recognitions in the industry, including being named on more than 40 great workplace and diversity and inclusion lists.

accordion.heading: External recognition as a top company

item_1670644899799.text:
• Newsweek’s Most Trustworthy Companies in America 2025
  • Workplace & Diversity: FORTUNE 100 Best Companies to Work For®
  • Workplace & Diversity: Great Place to Work's World's Best Workplaces™
  • People's 100 Companies that Care

item_1670644902920.text:
• EcoVadis Corporate Social Responsibility Assessment Silver Medal
  • FTSE4Good Index
  • UN Global Compact Member
  • Just Capital's 2026 Rankings
  • 3BL's 100 Best Corporate Citizens
  • USA Today's America's Climate Leaders List
